name: pdd
description: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework for reliable legacy refactor/rewrite/port with tracked behavioral parity: objective evidence, characterization tests, QA as a merge gate, PR dossiers, and a progress dashboard.

interface.shortDescription: Refactor, rewrite, and port legacy systems with tracked behavioral parity.
interface.longDescription: PDD turns "does the new system still behave like the old one?" into objective, tracked evidence. Each behavior of the reference system becomes a finding you investigate, fix, prove with a characterization test and a golden-master diff, and gate through QA before it reaches main. Provides /audit-bootstrap, /audit-new, /audit-investigate, /audit-resolve, /audit-compare, /audit-qa, /audit-pr and /audit-status.
defaultPrompt: I'm refactoring a legacy system and need to prove the new one still behaves the same.
Let's set up parity tracking for this migration.
